description_long: This is a classic twin-bell alarm clock with a round metal body and a slightly domed glass face. The clock features a brass-colored frame, bells, and handle, with a red main body and back panel. The face is white with large, red Arabic numerals and three black hands for hours, minutes, and seconds. The back of the clock displays several black knobs and switches for setting the time and alarm, as well as a winding mechanism. The clock stands on two small brass legs and has a third support at the back for stability.
description: A vintage twin-bell alarm clock with a brass frame, red body, and white face featuring red Arabic numerals and black hands.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white clock face with red Arabic numerals, three black hands, and brass bells and handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the red cylindrical body, brass bells, and the clock's depth.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the red back panel with multiple black knobs, switches, and winding mechanisms.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the red body and brass bells, similar to view 1 but mirrored.
attribute_face_design: Round white face with large red Arabic numerals, three black hands, and a small logo at the top center.
